transcript.clean_text: watch the Tour de France live and On Demand each and every day on gcn Plus stage two began in the capital of The Basque country in Victoria and will finish by the seaside in San Sebastian the second of three stages in The Basque country the first had given Adam Yates the yellow Jersey Victorious just ahead of his brother Simon EF education easy post was starting a man down unfortunately no Richard karapas who did finish the previous day after a crash and there would be no place either on the start list for Enric Mass the only man not to finish Brotherly Love at the front and on the front row as the Riders left Victoria and headed to San Sebastian the longest stage of the Tour de France 208.9 kilometers with five classified climes including the Mighty High Ski Bell coming 16.5 kilometers from the Finish three thousand meters of climbing another difficult there in the tour probably again one for the attackers on the attack from the start were three strong Riders Welter stage winner from a few years ago three-time Tour stage winner Edward Watson Hagen and Nelson Palace king of the mountains there's an early intermediate Sprint in the stage and it was a battle royale at the front for the points the weather was a little inclement mainly Sunny with a few Spells Of Rain and UA Emirates took control of the day cavania blew up with 71ks to go Nielsen Palace continuing to add points his foot of more for the king of the mountains there was the usual wet to dry problems Mateo trentine the victim of that he went down but be back on his bike also a nasty Crash from Maxine vocals he was the last to get up after four went down at that moment Jonas vinegar had been suffering from a puncture he would also return as Nielsen Palace was soon on his own 35ks to go just under two minutes of a gap could he do it the ants will be a resounding no because there was way too much Firepower behind climbing the highest ski belt powerless put in a strong enthusiastic and aggressive performance but behind they were equally as good if not better Rafael Mica with some magic distancing a lot of riders including tibopino a la Felipe would lose contact as well this was the best of the best GC Riders and a few others who could hang on Adam Yates leading up today pogachar Simon Yates going for bonus seconds at the top of High Ski belt eight five and two but they were taken by pugacha wingago with Yates taking third well gacha tried to push on but vinegar wasn't having any of it given that what fanat was one of those who'd managed to hang on in the group behind Tom pidcock was there as well but so was pay your Bilbao bask Rider who'd been through his hometown on stage one always strong on The Descent writing for himself and of course riding for the late Gino murder here was giving his everything he'd be caught though inside the last few kilometers Ben O'Connor guilla Mata and Louis Mikey's called out Matthias gelmos attacked up the front that would soon be pulled back for not yombo visma doing all the policing but could they control every move as the Finish Line got closer it was inside the final kilometer when Victor olafe French writer from kofitis who had him on a stage at the Tour de France in 15 long years managed to Dart out Lafayette already adjuted Italia stage winner one of the surprises of day one and he'd surprise the rest here looking like he might be caught but winning a disappointed for that second pogacho picking up more bonus seconds in third and Victor olafair taking the biggest win of his career and his team's biggest moment since 2008 when a young Silva chavanel last one at the tour for them Pitcock and fanat moving and missing out becoming a national and team hero a Frenchman winning a Tour stage is a special thing Victor Lafayette a special Rider finance and Bill Barren the top five as Yates and bogacha teammates in the jerseys cool down after another day another job well done yet still leading the tour Adam Yates in front of today pogacha who moved up into second place white jersey still on the back of the two-time tour Champion Simon yet took six seconds and in third place palace in the polka dot Jersey La fee moving into the points classification jersey with those 50 points taken and pogacha still the best young Rider so the stage three more Basque action but heading into the French side of the Basque country beginning in Spain in Amore and going up on the coast a few climbs and then finishing in Bayonne in France by Jonah in The Basque Country through San Juan De Los Angeles and 193.5 kilometers on the menu another difficult day ahead Maybe This Time some of the sprinters will be able to hold on for the first time as always you can watch each in every stage every pedal stroke live and On Demand on GCM Plus thank you
